headline: Perimeter Solutions, SA (PRM) Soars 14.8%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Perimeter Solutions, SA (PRM) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
